comments.post_body:
📢 I am extremely honored and grateful to have received the AERFAI (ASOCIACIÓN ESPAÑOLA DE RECONOCIMIENTO DE FORMAS Y ANÁLISIS DE IMÁGENES) 📔Best PhD Thesis📔 2023-2024.

👨‍🏫 I'm deeply thankful to my supervisor Petia Radeva and co-supervisor Eduardo Andrés Aguilar Torres for guiding me throughout this wonderful journey🙏🙏.

🤝 Huge shout out to my wonderful team at AIBA Consolidated Research Group - Facultat de Matemàtiques i Informatica Universitat de Barcelona, who have helped me kindle the research spirit and have contributed to every bit of this research quest.

#PhD #Gratitude #Thankful #Recognition #CV #DeepLearning #UB #IbPRIA #AERFAI
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post announcing the recipient of the AERFAI Best PhD Thesis 2023-2024 award, where the author expresses gratitude to their supervisors and team for their support throughout their PhD journey. The commenter is likely congratulating the author on their achievement and recognition in the field of deep learning research.

✈️ I'm excited to share that I am starting a new position as a Postdoctoral Researcher (Recognized Researcher) in the Life Sciences Dept. at the Barcelona Supercomputing Center 🏢 

Looking forward to this new role to grow both personally and professionally and learn from this great team!!!!! 
Awaiting new challenges, opportunities, and successes ahead! 🚀

#newjob #ai #dl #cv #lifesciences #ai4s

comments.post_body:
🎖I successfully defended ‍🎓 my Doctoral Thesis titled "Mastering the Triad of
Data, Models and Tasks in Deep Learning for Image Understanding" with "cum laude" distinction from the Facultat de Matemàtiques i Informatica Universitat de Barcelona, Universitat de Barcelona on the 27th of June !!!

👨‍🏫Big thanks to my supervisor Petia Radeva and co-supervisor Eduardo Andrés Aguilar Torres for guiding me throughout this wonderful journey.

I would like to thank the wonderful evaluation panel of Grégory Rogez, Vladimir Estivill-Castro, PhD and Oriol Pujol for the knowledgeable defense. Enjoyed the questions and conversations.

🏣Huge shoutout to my wonderful team at AIBA Consolidated Research Group and my TFG and TFM students who have helped me kindle the research spirit and have contributed to every bit of this research quest.

🤝Thanks to my family, friends, mentors and well-wishers for sharing all the joyful moments, supporting me through the difficult times and keeping me motivated always.

🙏Heartfelt gratitude to every teacher of mine, who has equipped me with the skills I possess today and will continue to shape my journey ahead. 

🏛Extending my gratitude to all the faculties of my "alma mater" Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, and all my colleagues from my previous employers Soliton Technologies, Texas Instruments and Bosch Global Software Technologies. 

This successful milestone won't be possible without you all !!!!!!

Ph·inishe·D 

#PhD #Gratitude #Thankful #DeepLearning #ComputerVision #CV #UB
comments.context_summary: The commenter is congratulating the author on successfully defending their Doctoral Thesis in Deep Learning for Image Understanding, and the author is expressing gratitude to their supervisors, evaluation panel, team, family, and friends for their support throughout the journey. The post is a celebratory announcement of the author's achievement, marked with a sense of relief and appreciation for the people who helped them reach this milestone.

comments.post_body:
Assistant Professor Dr. Rujira Ouncharoen, dean of the International College of Digital Innovation, Chiang Mai University, along with the administrative team, have joined in welcoming Dr. S.P. Gayathri, Department of Computer Science and Applications, Gandhigram Rural Institute, and Associate Professor Dr. S. Vijayalakshmi, Department of Data Science, CHRIST (Deemed to be University) Pune, Lavasa Campus, India, to discuss academic cooperation between Chiang Mai University and CHRIST (Deemed to be University) Pune, Lavasa Campus, India, on Tuesday, January 3, 2023, at meeting room ICB 1313, the International College of Digital Innovation building. # #digital #innovation #ICDI #ICDICMU #digitalstartupcollege

More info:
https://lnkd.in/guGAEt9P
https://lnkd.in/gFND9rYz
comments.context_summary: The International College of Digital Innovation at Chiang Mai University is exploring academic cooperation with CHRIST (Deemed to be University) Pune, Lavasa Campus, India, with a meeting held on January 3, 2023. The discussion aims to establish a collaborative relationship between the two institutions.

comments.post_body:
I am proud to announce that I have successfully completed New Product Development and Management certification course offered by one of our prestigious institute in the country Indian Institute of Technology, Delhi  organised as a live session on a platform from Emeritus #emeritus. To top it all, our team (Group 7) has won first among top 3 projects selected and will be further assisted by IIT Delhi in forming a startup and incubation.

Big thanks to the teaching faculties  prof.    Biswajita Parida  and Dr. Arnab Chanda, and to the industry experts who have taught us and provided us such a wonderful learning experience throughout the course.

Kudos to my team (Group 7), whom all I have tagged in this message for the wonderful collaboration, team effort and staying together and being positive through out the course and the project. I have had many fun moments and learnings from our team. I am really proud to be part of this team and together I believe we will embark on a journey for our lifetime. 

Sameer Joshi, Prof. Dr. 
Rajendra Panda 
SWAYARAJ KUMAR 
Swati Sharma 
Gyanendra Prasad 
Velusamy T 
Harbaksh Singh 
Vrajesh Dave 
Dhruv Agarwal
Karthikeyan Soundararajan
comments.context_summary: The commenter has completed a New Product Development and Management certification course from the Indian Institute of Technology, Delhi, and their team won first place among the top 3 projects, earning assistance from IIT Delhi to form a startup. The commenter is expressing pride and gratitude to their team and instructors for the learning experience and collaboration.
